name: it-maintenance-dataset
description: IT maintenance training dataset generation pipeline

scripts.scrape:all: ts-node src/main.ts scrape --source reddit-html && ts-node src/main.ts scrape --source superuser && ts-node src/main.ts scrape --source bleepingcomputer && ts-node src/main.ts scrape --source anandtech && ts-node src/main.ts scrape --source spiceworks && ts-node src/main.ts scrape --source tomshardware && ts-node src/main.ts scrape --source ifixit
scripts.scrape:all-parallel: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n reddit,superuser,bleeping,anandtech,spiceworks,tomshardware,ifixit -c red,blue,green,cyan,yellow,magenta,white "npm run scrape:reddit-html" "npm run scrape:superuser" "npm run scrape:bleepingcomputer" "npm run scrape:anandtech" "npm run scrape:spiceworks" "npm run scrape:tomshardware" "npm run scrape:ifixit"
scripts.label: ts-node src/main.ts label
